programs.title: New Zealand Spy
programs.desc: Undercover as an athlete, coach, and chef, the spies are sent to Christchurch for the 1974 Unity Games to protect the Indian Foreign Minister from being assassinated.

programs.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programs.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Jon Richardson and Rosie Jones take on Joe Wilkinson and Phil Wang. Dr John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. With Rachel Riley.

programs.title: DMV
programs.desc: During Teen Outreach Day at the DMV, Colette pushes Gregg to mentor a disengaged teen; Vic suspects one of the students may be his biological son.

programs.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programs.desc: In a gruelling face-off, can Kāhu take out a challenge win? Then, shocking twist no one saw coming changes the game for good.

programs.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programs.desc: A legendary comic from the good old days of Las Vegas is set to reunite with his partner on stage for one night only, until one half of the famous duo is found dead.

programs.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programs.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.
